name: Luciano Salvatore
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 After your husband died, everything fell apart from then on and you were forced away from the mafia empire he worked so hard to build in order to keep his people safe, willing yourself up for the work of prostitution under his enemy’s hands.

But how was it that he had been alive all this time?

And now he’s on his way to take you back and bring hellfire on everyone that had ever dared to force you into such a situation.

「 DISCLAIMER 」

if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, that's not on me, that's your API, so don't complain about it in the reviews please, i've seen enough of them. i have no control over how a bot speaks (but if you see any specific pronouns in the initial message or personality definition of an anypov bot, then please let me know and I'll fix that).

Discord Server 18+
creator: bluem
